titleStmt.title: SII 25.48: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 48. (A.R. No. 48 of 1908.) TIRUPPAṬṬŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Aiyaṉār temple.
This inscription commences with the praśasti, Pūmēvu-vaḷar tiruppoṉ, etc of the king.

It records a gift of four cows and a kuttuviḷakku weighing 40 (palam ?) for maintaining one-eighth of a lamp for a sandhi in front of the deity Piḷḷaiyāṟ (i.e., Aiyaṉār) of Tiruppiḍavūr, a brahmadēya in Tiruppiḍavūr-nāḍu, a division of Tribhuvamamuḻuduḍai-vaḷanāḍu by a goldsmith (taṭṭāṉ) named Gaṇapati alias Tiruchchiṟṟambalaperuntaṭṭāṉ, a nānādēśip-peruntaṭṭāṉ of Gaṅgaikoṇḍachōḻapuram. The record was engraved by one Dāsan Viḻikoṇḍān Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ of Pāmburam in Pāmbōr-nāḍu.
The goldsmith who figures as a donor in this record must have belonged to a merchant guild called nānādēśi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmevu vaḷart tiruppoṉ mārvu puṇara nāmevu kalaimakaḷ nalam perutu ciṟap
pa vijaiya māmakaḷ velpuyattirup pat ticaiyuñ celvamum meṇṭicai viḷaṅka niru
par vantiṟaiñca niṇil maṭantaiyait tirumaṇam puṇarntu cirvaḷar taruma maṇimuṭikavitteṉmal
lai ñālattu palluyiṟkellām mellaiyiliṉpamiyal viṉuṉeyti veṇkuṭai niḻaṟ
cci vāḻi pallūḻi yāḻi naṭappac cempoṉ virasiṅṅāsaṉattup puvaṉa muḻutuṭai
yāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya korājakecari panmarāna tripuvaṉaccakravarttikaḷ ciri kulottuṅka co
ḻa devaṟkku yāṇṭu [10]vatu tripuvaṉa muḻutuṭai vaḷanāṭṭut tiruppiṭavūr nāṭṭut devatāṉa brahma
deyan tiruppiṭavūr Uṭaiya piḷḷaiyārkku kaṅkaikoṇṭa coḻapurattu maṉaikkuṭi manaittaṭṭān U
ṭaiyān kaṇavatiyāna ṉānādecipperuntaṭṭāṉāṉa tiri ciṟṟampalapperuntaṭṭāneṉ yitdevaṟkkuc śandrāti
ttavaṟ cella santi Oṉṟukkut tiruviḷakku Erikaikku nān viṭṭa pacu ṉāliṉāl viḷakku Araikkāliṟku
ney kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻi Ivviḷakku Eriya Iṭṭa kutti viḷakku Oṉṟi nāliṭai nāṟppatu Ippaṭikku Ik
kal veṭṭi neṉ pāmpūr nāṭṭu pāmpurattut tācan viḻikoṇṭān tiricciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā
neṉ Ivai Enneḻuttu svastiśrī Itu panmāye
Digital edition of SII 25.48 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
